Bash(sleep 3 && python -c "
import requests, json

BASE = 'http://localhost:8000/api'
r = requests.post\(f'{BASE}/auth/login/', json={'email':'admin@focus.com','password':'Admin123!'}\)
access = r.json\(\)['access']
headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {access}'}

r = requests.get\(f'{BASE}/activities/', headers=headers\)
print\('STATUS:', r.status_code\)
if r.status_code == 200:
    data = r.json\(\)
    print\('OK — total:', data.get\('count', len\(data\)\)\)
    if data.get\('results'\):
        print\('Primer item:', json.dumps\(data['results'][0], indent=2, default=str\)\)
else:
    print\(r.text[:500]\)
" 2>&1)
